zh.Streatley, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾斯特亞特利

zh-hans.Streatley, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾斯特亞特利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Hare于1580年出生在英国貝德福爾雪登时，她的父亲Robert Hare33岁，母亲Nelle Harry25岁。她和Robert Norton至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Hare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÍr or Ó hÉir ‘descendant of Ír’, a personal name, possibly meaning ‘long-lasting’, borne by a legendary ancestor of the north of Ireland. This name was always monosyllabic.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAichir ‘descendant of Aichear’, a personal name derived from the epithet aichear ‘fierce, sharp’. The personal name on which this surname is based was originally disyllabic. Although the Anglicized forms O'Hehir and Hehir still exist, particularly in Ireland, pronunciation in later northern Irish has caused Ó hAichir to fall together with another surname, based on a one-syllable personal name, as in sense 1 above.

English: nickname from Middle English hare, harr, here ‘hare’ (Old English hara, sometimes influenced by Old Norse heri). It may have denoted someone who could run fast or was timorous, or who bore some similarity to a hare in appearance, such as bulging eyes.

variants.name: Hehir
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brighid.
Irish (Clare): variant of Hare 2 from Ó hAichir.

variants.name: Hairr
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Hare   or   Hair  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German   Herr  .

variants.name: Haire
meanings: Irish (northern): variant of   Hare   or   O'Hare  .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Hare was born in 1580, in Shelton, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Robert Hare, was 33 and her mother, Nelle Harry, was 25. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Robert Norton.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Hare est née en 1580, à Shelton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hare, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Nelle Harry, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Robert Norton.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Hare 1580 in Shelton, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Hare 33 und ihre Mutter Nelle Harry 25. Sie hatte mit Robert Norton mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Hare è nata il nel 1580 nel Shelton, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Robert Hare, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Nelle Harry, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Robert Norton.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Hare родилась в 1580 г. в местности шелтон, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Hare было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Nelle Harry, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Robert Norton.
